# MCP Instructions for MAKaminski GitHub Profile

## Objective
Keep the profile README accurate, current, and grounded in user-approved facts.

## Canonical sources
Use the following in this order:
1. Direct user instructions in the current task
2. Public profile context provided by the user (website, LinkedIn, GitHub)
3. Existing approved README content

If sources conflict, prefer conservative wording and ask for clarification.

## Accuracy guardrails
- Do not invent or infer employment history, titles, awards, sponsorships, or project ownership.
- Do not reintroduce legacy profile claims the user has asked to remove.
- Avoid placeholder links such as `yourlinkedin`.
- Prefer high-confidence, verifiable statements.

## README content guidelines
- Keep Markdown and inline HTML GitHub-render-safe.
- Prefer HTTPS for all embeds and links.
- Keep dynamic cards/widgets only when they render reliably.
- Avoid stale hardcoded metrics unless clearly marked static.
- Favor concise sections over overly complex interactive blocks.

## Profile context anchors
- Name/handle: Michael Kaminski (`MAKaminski`)
- Primary site: https://www.michael-kaminski.io/
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/MAKaminski
- LinkedIn (public profile context): https://linkedin.com/in/michaelxaxkaminski

## Issue-aware expectations
- Spotify rendering issues should use stable fallbacks when embeds fail.
- Badge links should prioritize usability and avoid dead or placeholder targets.

## Non-goals
- Do not add app/runtime code in this repository.
- Do not add speculative achievements or unverified timelines.
